skills.description: A guide on Apple Human Interface Guidelines (HIG) for selection and input controls, providing recommendations and best practices.
trigger_conditions: When designing or implementing user interfaces for macOS applications
anti_triggers: When creating simple on/off switches without additional context

skills.description: Check for `.claude/apple-design-context.md` before asking questions. Use existing context and only ask for information not already covered.
trigger_conditions: When a user needs to access menu or button options in an Apple application
anti_triggers: When the user is looking for general information that can be found elsewhere

skills.description: Check for .claude/apple-design-context.md before asking questions. Use existing context and only ask for information not already covered.
trigger_conditions: When a user initiates a question or interaction in an application that uses Apple's Human Interface Guidelines (HIG)
anti_triggers: When the context file .claude/apple-design-context.md is not present or outdated

skills.description: Check for .claude/apple-design-context.md before asking questions. Use existing context and only ask for information not already covered.
trigger_conditions: When a user asks a question that can be answered using existing context
anti_triggers: When the question requires new or sensitive data that should not be disclosed without proper consent
